positive: Minimalist celestial forest landscape, featuring bioluminescent flora and glowing animal silhouettes (deer, fox, owl) within a stylized, crescent-moon archway. Deep indigo and sapphire blue primary colors contrasted with vibrant teal, magenta, and neon yellow accents for the bioluminescence. Strong, high-contrast silhouette composition suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing. The art style should be a blend of Art Nouveau etching and modern flat illustration, with clean lines and perfect negative space. Focused, centered composition with a sense of mystery and whimsical calm. High saturation, vector-like quality, highly detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, text, signature, watermark, low quality, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, illegible, photographic, 3d render, muted colors, empty background
